Motion To Compel Defendant Altais Health Solutions To Provide Responses To Form Interrogatories- Employment Law; Request For Sanctions Against Defendant And Its Counsel Of Record
Off Calendar Feb-20-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom Conference
Leo Livshits, Esq., BLACKSTONE LAW, APC (310) 622-4278 llivshits@blackstonepc.com, Attorneys for Plaintiff ROBERTO MALDONADO
Donald P. Sullivan, Esq., JACKSON LEWIS P.C. (415) 394-9400 Donald.Sullivan@jacksonlewis.com
Attorneys for Defendants ALTAIS, ALTAIS HEALTH SOLUTIONS, ALTAIS MEDICAL GROUP, INC., ALTAIS
HEALTH LLC

All parties present stipulate to Judge Pro Tem Scott Borrowman deciding today's motion. All parties present and the court authorize the clerk to sign the Judge Pro Tem Stipulation on their behalf.

Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF ROBERTO MALDONADO'S Motion To Compel Defendant Altais Health Solutions To Provide Responses To Form Interrogatories- Employment Law; Request For Sanctions Against Defendant And Its Counsel Of Record

Motion to compel GRANTED. Objections are waived because they were not served timely under the agreement. While there may be questions about actual receipt of the discovery requests, Defendant has not introduced admissible (non-hearsay) evidence of non-receipt. Defendants may bring a motion for relief from waiver under CCP 2030.290 if appropriate. Sanctions GRANTED in the amount of $1,400 based on 1 hour preparing the motion and 1 hour on the reply.

The prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling and must e-mail it to the Judge Pro Tem Scott Borrowman at sborrowman@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Scott Borrowman; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/JPT)
